case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. SONIA LUCANA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) SONIA LUCANA. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, ANGEL $10,590.47 PRINCIPAL, $347.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,937.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED DEC-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, ANGEL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT : DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585; ATTY. FEES AND COSTS CCP 1033; COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS EVID 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LUCANA, SONIA RIVERA, ANGEL DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-2009
DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $347.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, ANGEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCANA, SONIA
